title: A retina chip that restores sight is going on sale in Europe
summary: This is the first device from a US brain-implant company to reach patients widely. Prima already holds FDA Breakthrough Device and Humanitarian Use Device designations, both meant to speed narrow, high-need treatments.
caption: output/2026-07-23/a-retina-chip-that-restores-sight-is-going-on-sale-in-europe.txt
